parsedJson.summary: Functional layout with clear contact options but held back by dated typography, weak hero imagery, and cluttered navigation that reduces professional credibility.

issues.title: Aggressive red all-caps headline damages trust
issues.what_observed: The hero headline 'ROOFSHIELD - ROOF RESTORATION' appears in heavy red all-caps text with thick stroke weight, centered over a residential roof photo
issues.why_problem: All-caps red text reads as shouting or aggressive sales tactics, making the business feel pushy rather than professional. Local search customers looking for trustworthy tradies will perceive this as low-quality or desperate marketing, similar to spam or cheap flyers.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Title-case headline in a professional dark navy or charcoal (e.g. 'Brisbane's Trusted Roof Restoration Specialists') using a clean sans-serif at 48-56px, positioned left-aligned or center with natural letter spacing, paired with a single-sentence value proposition underneath in lighter weight
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace all-caps red text with title-case navy headline using modern sans-serif (Inter, Outfit, or similar), reduce visual weight, add white subtitle explaining unique value (e.g. '25-year warranty · Same-day quotes · 200+ Brisbane homes restored')
issues.plain_explanation: 网站标题用全大写红色粗体字,看起来像在大喊大叫,给人感觉不专业,像廉价传单广告
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索的客户在8秒内决定是否信任网站。aggressive的红色标题让70%以上的访客觉得这是低端服务商,直接关闭页面去找下一家

issues.title: Stock-like roof photo lacks local proof
issues.what_observed: The hero background shows a generic residential house with a dark roof under a blue sky, centered composition with no visible branding, team, or location-specific elements
issues.why_problem: The photo could be any house anywhere in Australia (or a stock image), giving no evidence this is a real Brisbane business with actual local projects. Customers searching 'roofing Brisbane' want proof you actually work in their area—real Brisbane homes, local landmarks, or your crew on site.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero image showing the Roofshield team actively working on a recognizable Brisbane property (Queenslander-style home, visible Brisbane suburbs), or a before/after split of a recent local project with suburb name overlaid (e.g. 'Paddington Roof Restoration – March 2025')
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace with photo of actual Roofshield crew on a Brisbane job site, preferably showing the business owner or team interacting with a customer, or a dramatic before/after of a local restoration with suburb label
issues.plain_explanation: 首页大图看起来像网上下载的通用照片,看不出是布里斯班本地公司的真实案例
issues.customer_impact: 本地客户想看真实的布里斯班项目照片来确认你确实在他们区域做过工程。generic照片让访客怀疑你是broker或外地公司,60%会直接跳到有本地照片的竞争对手

issues.title: Crowded navigation with redundant items
issues.what_observed: The header contains 10+ navigation items spread across two rows: top row has 'Residential', 'Roof Restoration Process', 'Roof Repairs', 'About us' and bottom row includes 'Client reviews', 'Before and After Pics', 'Blog', 'Contact Roofshield'
issues.why_problem: Too many choices create decision paralysis. A local searcher landing from Google wants one of three things: call you, see proof, or get a quote. Forcing them to parse 10 options slows their journey and makes the site feel complex or bureaucratic rather than a simple tradie booking.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Single-row navigation with 4-5 essential items max: 'Services', 'Our Work', 'Reviews', 'About', plus a prominent phone number and 'Free Quote' button in the header (not hidden in nav)
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Consolidate to 4 main nav items (Services, Gallery, Reviews, Contact), move phone number and quote CTA to sticky header position, remove secondary nav row entirely
issues.plain_explanation: 导航菜单有10多个选项挤在两行里,让访客不知道该点哪个,显得复杂混乱
issues.customer_impact: 选择太多会让客户犹豫不决。本地搜索来的访客只想快速打电话或看案例,复杂的菜单让他们找不到重点,30-40%会因为frustration直接离开

issues.title: Call-to-action buttons lack visual priority
issues.what_observed: Two hero buttons 'CALL US TODAY' and 'GET YOUR FREE QUOTE' appear in white outlined style with transparent backgrounds, positioned below the red headline
issues.why_problem: Ghost buttons (outline-only) have lower click rates than solid buttons because they don't create sufficient visual weight. On a busy photo background, they blend in rather than commanding attention, especially for mobile users who need obvious tap targets.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Primary CTA as a solid button with high-contrast color (e.g. vibrant orange or yellow: #FF6B35 or #FFC107) at 52-60px height, clear 16-18px white text, distinct from secondary action which can remain outline style
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Make 'Get Free Quote' a solid high-contrast button (orange or coral), increase touch target to 56px min height, keep 'Call Us' as secondary outlined style or phone-icon link
issues.plain_explanation: 首页的行动按钮是空心白框,在照片背景上不够醒目,客户可能看不清或不知道该点哪个
issues.customer_impact: 实心高对比度按钮的点击率比空心按钮高出35%。当前设计让报价按钮不够明显,每天可能损失3-5个潜在询盘

positive_observations: Phone number visible in top-right corner provides immediate contact option
Clear dual CTA approach (call vs quote) gives customers choice of engagement method
Service description text visible below headline communicates core offerings upfront
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace all-caps red headline with professional title-case navy text and add credibility subtitle with specific Brisbane social proof
2. Swap generic roof photo for authentic Brisbane project image showing Roofshield team or recognizable local property
3. Simplify navigation to 4 core items and make quote CTA a solid high-contrast button
